title: peucedanum oreoselinum subsp. bourgaei
intro: Peucedanum oreoselinum subsp. bourgaei, also known as Bourga's carrot fern, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the carrot family that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bourga's carrot fern include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, as well as its ability to act as a natural diuretic and antispasmodic. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
